statement: In every magma, Equation 1123 (`x = y * ((y * (y * y)) * y)`) implies Equation 4479 (`x * (y * y) = (y * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0396
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y y)) y))) :
    ∀ x y : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op (op y x) x)
